hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gradlew (build|test|bootRun)'; then echo '[hook] Running Gradle — this may take a moment'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.java$'; then echo '[hook] Java file changed. If you added a new entity or repository, remember to create a Flyway migration in src/main/resources/db/migration/.'; fi
